Sayulita Dallas / FW What to Wear

Dallas / Fort Worth · Spring Break 2026

What to Wear

Tried to put everything my mom said and pictures together for outfit inspo

01
Friday  — Arrival & Dinner
Flight · Uchi Dallas · Family Dinner
Uchi Sushi
Dinner — Uchi Dallas
Casual & Cute — Dallas Dinner Energy
Pretty much can wear what you'd wear to a nice dinner in SD. Jeans with a good top, or a sundress if it's warm.
Casual / relaxed dinner
Dinner inspo — jeans & a good top
02
Saturday  — Stockyards & Rodeo
Fort Worth · Stockyards · Rodeo · Bricks & Horses
Stockyards
Stockyards Day
Western — Boots
This is the most Texas day of your life. A dress or skirt with cowboy boots is the perfect Stockyards look. Weather-dependent: if it's warm, a lighter dress. If it's cool, layer with a denim or leather jacket. We may be walking a lot so just keep that in mind.
Western casual
Stockyards group — boots & western casual
Outside Hotel Drover / 97 West — mini skirt + boots
Western night out energy — hats, boots, layers
Dinner — Bricks & Horses
Step It Up — Texas Chophouse
Bricks & Horses is inside the Bowie House hotel — a proper upscale Texas chophouse. A dress with cowboy boots like the stripe dress photo below is what my sister will be in.Boots at dinner is completely normal and expected.
Elevated western / smart casual
Dinner inspo — mini dress + brown boots
03
Sunday  — Easter
Hudson House Lunch · Hotel Drover Drinks
Easter Sunday
Easter Sunday
Sundress
Easter sunday is just like a sundress type of vibe. My mom wants to emphasize that we aren't super fancy so don't worry about that. A sundress or skirt type of thing would be great. I will probalby be in a long sleeve or collared shirt. Hudson House is definelty more casual than Drover, can wear what you wear to church, or change to just a normal going out outfit. Anything works!
Easter Sunday / polished casual
Easter / Hudson House inspo — midi dress + white jacket + heels
